creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I suspect you are not using the standard "GENERIC" config file, but have 
customised it.  The standard GENERIC file in RELENG_7 has "options wlan" 
on line 227, which you seem to be missing. 

I'm closing this PR.  If you are still having problems compiling your 
kernel, it's probably best if you ask for advice on the freebsd-stable 
mailing list, build problems can usually be resolved much faster there 
than through the PR system.
